retval.devnotes:
abstract base type for a model component, forward declaration Base type for the central model component It summarizes the submodels of the simulation model and provides methods for data output, parameter estimation, and sensitivity analysis. It is descended either from Tobject if compiled for command line application or from TPersistent if compiled for GUI appplication.
abstract base type for the main model control component all submodels have to be connected to this component via their property gm_submodel property.
